name_cn:
M83585 Silver Buckle
A "Porto Cult LV Charm" made of soft Monogram Unplant leather featuring embossed Monogram patterns. It has 2 card slots on each side and 1 large slot in the middle, for a total of 5 slots, making it a practical item for daily use. Decorated with 2 Monogram Flower charms, adding a feminine touch.
10.2 x 7.3 x 0.3 cm
